attributes.readMe:
## Summary

The `Digimon` spec is a card definition that represents a card type for Digimon in the Boxel application.

## Import

```gts
import { CardDef } from 'https://cardstack.com/base/card-api';
```

## Usage as a Field

To use the `Digimon` spec as a field within a consuming card or field, you can define the field like this:

```gts
@field digimon = linksTo(Digimon);
```

This will create a field that links to a `Digimon` card instance.

## Template Usage

To display a `Digimon` card within a template, you can use the following code:

```hbs
<@fields.digimon @format="embedded" />
```

This will render the `Digimon` card in the `embedded` format.
